area-selector.description: Region-selection overlay. Baseline core/window/event access only — no updater, process restart, global shortcuts, or window-state persistence.

capture-preview.description: Capture preview card. Baseline core/window/event access only — no updater, process restart, global shortcuts, or window-state persistence.

main.description: Full permission set for the main dashboard window: updater, process restart, global shortcuts, and window-state persistence.
